title: Star Wars Omnibus
content:
{{Top|rwm|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the series of collected editions published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]|[[Marvel Omnibus]], a series of collected editions published by [[Marvel Comics]]}}
[[File:Omnibus.jpg|right|250px]]

'''''Star Wars Omnibus''''' is [[Dark Horse Comics]]' program to release volumes collecting [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] that were formerly difficult or near-impossible to find. A Dark Horse publisher's summary states:

:''Dark Horse Comics' Star Wars Omnibus Collections were created as a way to showcase actual novel-length stories or series, and to provide homes for "orphaned" series, single-issue stories, and short stories which would otherwise never be collected, or which might fall out of print.''

Eventually, there would probably be an Omnibus for every series (or for groups of stories taking place in the same time period). Each Omnibus volume would contain the equivalent of three to five 4-issue trade paperbacks. Dark Horse planned to release two or three per year, resulting in all of the existing trade paperbacks being "omnibussed". Having "omnibussed" all of the existing comic material, the project would become an ongoing program. After the sale of Star Wars to Disney, [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Epic Collection]] series now carries out the task of republishing large amounts of collected [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] issues in paperback format.

==Continuity==
*The Omnibus releases are smaller in size (6" x 9") than the standard comic book or trade paperback release. This does not, however, affect the layout, coloring or lettering.
*The Omnibus releases do not include a cover gallery for each story arc featured in a release—only one cover is included for each story arc as well as an original piece for the front of the collections themselves. However, ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Rise of the Sith]]'' and ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Shadows of the Empire]]'' do include a partial cover gallery.
*The Omnibus releases specify the time a story takes place in for each story arc.
